property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3\bin;;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testFromContext_WithForeignKey_OnUpdateRestrict
testcase.system-out: 15:55:12.351 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> order_idINTREFERENCESorders(id)ON UPDATERESTRICT 15:55:12.361 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Extracted Foreign Key -> Referenced Table: orders, Referenced Column: id 15:55:12.363 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'INT' to Java type 'Long' 15:55:12.364 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: order_id, SQL Type: INT, Java Type: Long, Primary Key: false 15:55:12.364 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.ColumnDefinitionTest -- Starting test: testFromContext_WithForeignKey_OnUpdateRestrict 15:55:12.364 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.ColumnDefinitionTest -- Column Details - Name: order_id, SQL Type: INT, Base SQL Type: INT, Length: 255, Precision: 0, Scale: 0, Primary Key: false, Foreign Key: true, Nullable: true, Unique: false, Default: null, Check Constraint: null
